name: Values
description: A clean, multi-column section for listing company values or unique selling points. Features theme-colored icons and concise descriptive text.

field_schema.label: Eyebrow
field_schema.help: A small, uppercase label displayed above the main heading.

field_schema.label: Heading
field_schema.help: The primary title of the section.

sub_fields.label: Accent color
sub_fields.help: Choose the theme color for this element.

sub_fields.label: Icon
sub_fields.help: Select the icon that best represents this item.

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.help: The name or title of this item.

sub_fields.label: Body
sub_fields.help: The main descriptive text for this section.

items.title: No tourist traps
items.body: If it's in every guidebook, we're not taking you there. Period.

items.title: Supporting locals
items.body: Every vendor we work with is a neighbor. Every guide earns a real wage.

items.title: Always sustainable
items.body: Small groups, reusable everything, and trips that leave places better.
